problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: Combining Quantum tunneling through energy barrier with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
